positive: Minimalist geometric forest landscape, featuring stylized, abstract trees and winding paths, designed for repeating pattern tile. Strong silhouette composition with interlocking shapes. Color palette limited to deep emerald green, sage green, charcoal black, and hints of metallic bronze. Use negative space prominently. Flat illustration style with high contrast and crisp lines, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Central focus is a stylized, interwoven grouping of natural elements.
